subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-23 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Had they not killed the Qa’im-Maqam, Persia would never have fallen into ruin
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر قائم مقام را نکشته بودند ایران ویران نمی‌شد و اگر نصائح الهیه را شنیده بودند
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @East and West; communication between East and West
